demo.dockside: Dockside systems are open. Twenty tons of machine parts are aboard. Manifest M1 is filed. The hold has accepted all three statements.
demo.comms: Comms window open. Messages queue now. Delivery order remains undecided.
demo.transit: Jump plotted from Regina to Vantage. One parsec. The route is shorter than the financing.
demo.arrival: Reach Consolidated has paid for eighteen crates. Your manifest says twenty. I've read it twice. It still says twenty.
